mapper.select:
SELECT o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_code AS orderCode, m.member_id AS memberId, o.orderer_name AS ordererName, o.pay_price AS payPrice, o.payment_method AS paymentMethod, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.order_date AS orderDate, CASE WHEN o.order_status = '주문취소' THEN '주문취소' WHEN o.order_status IN ('반품진행', '반품완료', '교환진행', '교환완료') THEN o.order_status WHEN d.receipt_date IS NULL THEN '배송준비' WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), d.receipt_date) >= 3 THEN '배송완료' WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), d.receipt_date) >= 1 THEN '배송중' ELSE '배송준비' END AS deliveryStatus, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_item oi WHERE oi.order_no = o.order_no) AS itemTotalCount FROM orders o JOIN member m ON o.member_no = m.member_no LEFT JOIN delivery d ON d.delivery_no = ( SELECT MIN(d2.delivery_no) FROM delivery d2 WHERE d2.order_no = o.order_no )
AND o.order_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND o.orderer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY o.order_no DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o
AND o.order_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND o.orderer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT o.order_code AS orderCode, o.payment_method AS paymentMethod, o.orderer_name AS ordererName, o.orderer_hp AS ordererHp, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.discount_price AS discountPrice, o.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, o.pay_price AS payPrice, d.receiver_name AS receiverName, d.receiver_hp AS receiverHp, d.zip AS zip, d.addr1 AS addr1, d.addr2 AS addr2 FROM orders o LEFT JOIN delivery d ON d.delivery_no = ( SELECT MIN(d2.delivery_no) FROM delivery d2 WHERE d2.order_no = o.order_no ) WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT oi.product_no AS productNo, oi.product_name AS productName, oi.product_image AS productImage, oi.price AS price, oi.discount_rate AS discountRate, oi.quantity AS quantity, oi.total_price AS totalPrice, sp.company_name AS companyName FROM order_item oi JOIN seller_profile sp ON oi.seller_no = sp.seller_no WHERE oi.order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO delivery (order_no, seller_no, receiver_name, receiver_hp, zip, addr1, addr2, courier, invoice_no, memo, delivery_status, receipt_date) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{sellerNo}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverHp}, #{zip}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{courier}, #{invoiceNo}, #{memo}, '배송중', NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE courier = #{courier}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo}, memo = #{memo}, delivery_status = '배송중', shipped_date = NOW()
